name: 16-eyes
description: AI-driven security audits — full-repo or diff/PR-scoped — for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot. Profiles the repo, designs tailored investigation lenses, runs them, verifies every finding, adversarially reviews high-impact ones. Install with --target <claude|gemini|cursor|copilot|all>, then use init/audit/audit-diff/fix.
